nutshell.heading: Non-ADV promotion and Club Avolta
items: Avolta ID and tier displayed on the order detail page and the pick-up sheet.
Non-adv promotions fields have UI validations.
Exclude items from Non-ADV Promotions using SAP codes

nutshell.heading: Locker:
items: Added 2 new delivery statuses : Locker booked and Locker retreived

nutshell.heading: Operational enhancements
items: Update cart calculation logic to exclude configured products from Non-ADV promotions.
Quota violations section always in an expanded view.
Stock source and Stock destination column added on the orders page.
Added Club Avolta ID and Tier details to the order details page
Import and display codes from Magento on the order details page and print order sheet.
Added collection time to the Collection date column in the Order Fulfilment page
